---
name: Feature request
about: Concrete capability you want stoa to add
title: "feat: <short description>"
labels: ["enhancement", "triage"]
---

## Problem

<!--
What user-visible problem are you trying to solve? Skip "it would be
cool if..." — describe the workflow that breaks today.
-->

## Proposed change

<!--
What should stoa do differently? CLI surface, on-disk format, hook
behavior — be specific. If you have a sketch of the API, paste it.
-->

## Alternatives considered

<!-- Other approaches you weighed and why they didn't fit. -->

## Scope check

- [ ] Fits within the v0.1 MVP scope as defined in `ROADMAP.md` §"What MVP is"
- [ ] Or: belongs to a post-MVP milestone in `ROADMAP-POST-MVP.md`
- [ ] Or: out of scope (please justify why it's worth considering anyway)

## Risks / blast radius

<!--
Touches the hook hot path (<10 ms p95 budget)? Touches the
MINJA-wrapped injection? Affects the Layer 1 / Layer 2 split? Note any
load-bearing invariant the change crosses.
-->
